text.title: Feedback Management Examples
text.summary: Worked end-to-end example showing the methodology applied on a representative case.

example.title: Monthly review surfaces ARR-weighted theme + close-loop sent
example.code: month: 2026-05 themes: - id: performance-export-large-dataset item_count: 17 weighted_score: 124000.0 verbatim_citations: - participant: U_3471 text: "When I export the report it always crashes if more than 1000 rows." disposition: will-do close_loop_count: 14
example.note: Illustrates segment-weighted ranking + close-loop discipline + monthly review cadence.

example.title: Vote-only top theme drowning enterprise signal
example.code: month: 2026-05 themes: - id: app-is-slow item_count: 342 weighted_score: 342 disposition: under-consideration close_loop_count: 0
